entries.source: Feynman Tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa Feynman

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Feynman Tutor ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: jaribu kueleza dhana kwa urahisi. Mkufunzi wako huona mapengo, huuliza maswali, na hukusaidia kujenga upya maelezo.

entries.source: First-principles learning
entries.value: Kujifunza kwa kanuni za kwanza

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Kwanza, mkufunzi hutambua lengo. "Nataka kuelewa gharama ya fursa" ni tofauti na "Nahitaji kutatua swali hili la kazi ya nyumbani ya uchumi" au "Nahitaji kutetea msimamo katika mjadala." Lengo ndilo huunda maswali.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Mjenzi wa Flashcard

entries.source: Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Flashcard Builder

entries.source: flashcard generation
entries.value: utengenezaji wa kadi za kumbukumbu

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Flashcards ni mojawapo ya njia rahisi zaidi za kufanya hili.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Flashcards zina nguvu, lakini si mchakato mzima wa kusoma. Zinafaa zaidi kwa kukumbuka, msamiati, fasili, fomula, tofauti, na mifano muhimu. Zinakuwa dhaifu wakati mwanafunzi hajawahi kuelewa wazo tangu mwanzo.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flashcards hufanya kazi vizuri zaidi zinapopima wazo moja kwa wakati, zinaonyesha majibu baada tu ya juhudi, na kurudisha kadi zilizokosewa mapema zaidi.

entries.source: Follow practical study workflows that connect free guest AI learning modes with guides, prompts, quizzes, and review loops.
entries.value: Fuata mitiririko ya vitendo ya kusoma inayounganisha hali za bure za kujifunza kwa AI za wageni na miongozo, vidokezo, maswali, na mizunguko ya marudio.

entries.source: Follow the story into live public pages.
entries.value: Fuata hadithi hadi kwenye kurasa za umma za moja kwa moja.

entries.source: Footer links
entries.value: Viungo vya chini ya ukurasa

entries.source: For
entries.value: Kwa

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Kwa njia ya kina zaidi, soma mwongozo wa Flashcard Builder na vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Flashcard Builder. Lengo si seti nzuri ya kadi. Lengo ni kukumbuka zaidi noti zinapokuwa hazipo.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Kwa mwanafunzi, hilo linaweza kuhisi tofauti sana na kutafuta wavuti. Utafutaji hutoa kurasa. Msaidizi wa kujifunza hutoa njia.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Kwa mtazamo mpana wa jinsi kurasa za umma zinavyounganishwa, vinjari ramani ya kujifunza kwa AI, vituo vya masomo, au maktaba ya vidokezo vya kujifunza kwa AI. Kurasa hizo zimeundwa kufanya bidhaa ieleweke kwa wanafunzi na igundulike na mifumo ya utafutaji bila kuficha sehemu zenye manufaa nyuma ya ukuta wa akaunti.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Kwa mfano, mwanafunzi anayesoma demokrasia anaweza kuzungumza na Ambedkar, kisha kumwomba Source Critic atathmini hotuba au kifungu cha katiba. Mwanafunzi anayesoma jiji anaweza kuanza na Geography Explorer ili kuelewa mahali, kisha kuingia kwenye mazungumzo ya kihistoria.

entries.source: For teachers

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Kwa mara ya kwanza, koloni la zamani lisilokuwa na historia ya taifa hapo awali likawa nguvu ya kimataifa. Wafalme na malkia wa Ulaya waliondolewa madarakani, na Marekani ikaibuka kama alama ya demokrasia, ubepari, na dunia huru. Wakati huohuo, itikadi mpya ya ukomunisti iliibuka na Umoja wa Kisovieti ukawa mfano wake wa vitendo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: uliza swali lolote na ujifunze kupitia maelezo wazi, mifano, vidokezo vya ufuatiliaji, na ufundishaji wa AI wenye subira.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: uliza maswali, changamkia mawazo, na jifunze historia kupitia mazungumzo yenye msingi na watu wa umma kutoka zamani.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: buni miradi, hadithi, miundo, vichwa, majaribio, na mitazamo isiyotarajiwa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: leta kifungu au wazo la kitabu na jenga uelewa kupitia mihtasari, msamiati, hitimisho, na majadiliano.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jenga pasipoti ya wakati, pitia ushauri wa safari, na chunguza ulimwengu wa kihistoria kupitia mandhari, ramani, kalenda ya matukio, watu, sheria, vitu, na ushahidi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jenga msamiati kwa maana, mifano, vidokezo vya matamshi, mitego ya kumbukumbu, na mazoezi ya haraka.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: geuza taarifa, orodha, hotuba, au mfuatano kuwa mandhari za akili zinazokumbukika.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: tengeneza mpango wa kusoma kuzunguka muda wako, nguvu, malengo, na sehemu dhaifu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jadili mada yoyote, changamkiwa, linganisha madai, na jifunze jinsi ya kutoa hoja zenye nguvu zaidi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: ingia kwenye kesi halisi, fanya maamuzi, ona matokeo, na jifunze kanuni iliyo nyuma ya kila chaguo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: tathmini makala, madai, video, au machapisho kwa ushahidi, upendeleo, uaminifu, na muktadha unaokosekana.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: chunguza kazi za sanaa, mitindo, wasanii, chaguo za kuona, na kinachofanya picha iwe na nguvu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: chunguza taaluma kupitia mapendeleo, ujuzi, mifano ya siku kazini, na hatua zinazofuata.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: chunguza nchi, miji, mito, hali ya hewa, uhamiaji, rasilimali, na jinsi jiografia inavyounda maisha.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: chunguza utambulisho, maarifa, haki, uhuru, furaha, na maswali mengine ya kina kupitia kufikiri kwa makini.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: tengeneza jaribio lililolenga la chaguo nyingi kuhusu somo lolote na rudia maelezo baada ya kila jibu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: ondoka kwenye kukwama kihisia, pata hatua ndogo inayofuata, na jenga tena kasi bila hatia.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: ondoka kwenye kukwama kwenye kazi za nyumbani kwa vidokezo vya kimaadili, mifano, ukaguzi, na mwongozo wa hatua kwa hatua.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: boresha uandishi kwa kupanga, kurekebisha, muundo, na mrejesho unaohifadhi sauti yako.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jifunze kwa kufanya, kuona, kulinganisha, kurekebisha, na kuthibitisha umahiri. Programu hujenga turubai hai ya somo kuzunguka lengo lako badala ya kugeuza ufundishaji kuwa gumzo refu. Jaribu: "Nifundishe uundaji wa modeli za kifedha."

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jifunze katiba, demokrasia, uchaguzi, mahakama, haki, wajibu, na sera za umma.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jifunze noti, akodi, mizani ya muziki, mdundo, mawazo ya mafunzo ya sikio, na jinsi nyimbo zinavyojengwa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jifunze kupitia maswali yaliyolenga, vidokezo, na tafakari badala ya kusoma majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fanya kujifunza kuhisi kama mchezo wenye safari, viwango, pointi, changamoto, na raundi za bosi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: ramani jinsi mawazo yanavyohusiana, kuanzia sababu na matokeo hadi kategoria, mifano, na mikinzano.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: tambua kinachokusaidia kujifunza, kinachokuzuia, na jinsi ya kuwa mwanafunzi imara zaidi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fungua nafasi ya kazi ya pamoja na mshirika wa AI. Tengeneza kazi mbichi, badilishaneni marekebisho, changamkia sehemu dhaifu, rekodi maamuzi, na ondoka na maendeleo thabiti.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: bandika swali, jibu lako, na jibu linalotarajiwa ikiwa unalo. Msaidizi wako hueleza mantiki na hukusaidia kuepuka kosa lilelile wakati ujao.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: bandika data, maelezo ya chati, au matokeo na ujifunze yanamaanisha nini, hayamaanishi nini, na cha kuuliza baadaye.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: panga mradi wa shule, ubunifu, usimbaji, au binafsi kwa wigo, hatua muhimu, vizuizi, na hatua zinazofuata.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: panga na endesha vipindi vya haraka vya marudio vinavyoimarisha kumbukumbu ya muda mrefu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: panga maonyesho salama, elewa vigeu, tabiri matokeo, na fikiria kutokana na ushahidi kama mwanasayansi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: cheza na masoko, uhaba, motisha, sera, na fedha binafsi kupitia uigaji rahisi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fanya mazoezi ya lugha katika hali halisi kama mikahawa, mahojiano, safari, na maisha ya kila siku, ukiwa na marekebisho baada ya kila zamu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fanya mazoezi ya hoja kwa kujadiliana na mtu wa umma au wa kubuni kuhusu mada unayochagua.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fanya mazoezi ya mazungumzo ya majadiliano, migogoro, huduma kwa wateja, uongozi, au mazungumzo yoyote yenye uzito mkubwa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fanya mazoezi ya viva, mitihani ya mdomo, utetezi wa miradi, na maswali ya haraka ya ufuatiliaji kwa mrejesho mtulivu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jiandae kwa mahojiano ya shule, internship, kazi, au udhamini kwa maswali halisi na mrejesho.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jiandae kwa hotuba, mawasilisho, mahojiano, au mitihani ya mdomo kwa vidokezo, muda, na mrejesho kuhusu muundo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: sema unachodhani kinaendelea, na msaidizi wako atambue dhana potofu zilizofichwa kwa vipimo vya upole.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: jaribu kueleza dhana kwa urahisi. Mkufunzi wako huona mapengo, huuliza maswali, na hukusaidia kujenga upya maelezo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: geuza mada pana kuwa maswali ya utafiti, maneno ya kutafuta, mihtasari, na noti za vyanzo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: geuza dhana kuwa hadithi, wahusika, migogoro, na mandhari zinazokumbukika.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: geuza nia kuwa tabia ndogo za kujifunza zinazoweza kurudiwa, zenye vichocheo, zawadi, na mipango ya kurejea.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: geuza noti au mada kuwa flashcards zilizolenga zenye vidokezo, majibu, mifano, na mitego ya kawaida.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: geuza mtaala wako, tarehe ya mtihani, muda, na maeneo dhaifu kuwa mpango wa vitendo wa kusoma.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: elewa msimbo, rekebisha makosa, jifunze dhana za programu, na jenga miradi midogo hatua kwa hatua.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: fafanua matukio ya kihistoria kupitia sababu, vichocheo, matokeo, na uwezekano mbadala.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: shughulikia algebra, kalkulasi, maswali ya maneno, na dhana za hisabati hatua moja kwa wakati pamoja na kocha wa AI.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Kwa hali hii, kazi ni rahisi: shughulikia mitanziko kwa kupima wadau, matokeo, wajibu, haki, na mambo ya kubadilishana.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Kwa uandishi, hilo linamaanisha kutumia Writing Coach kuboresha tasnifu, muundo, au aya huku ukihifadhi sauti yako. Kwa msimbo, linamaanisha kutumia Code Tutor kueleza makosa, kukuuliza utabiri matokeo, na kukusaidia kurekebisha badala ya kubandika suluhisho kamili. Kwa mitihani, linamaanisha kutumia Exam Prep Planner kuamua cha kurudia kwanza na jinsi ya kujipima.

entries.source: Format this website in MLA
entries.value: Umbiza tovuti hii katika MLA

entries.source: Format, flag missing data, and explain how to verify the source details.
entries.value: Panga muundo, weka alama data inayokosekana, na eleza jinsi ya kuthibitisha maelezo ya chanzo.

entries.source: Foundational guides for explanations, tutoring behavior, study habits, prompt quality, and choosing the right learning mode.
entries.value: Miongozo ya msingi kwa maelezo, tabia ya ufundishaji, tabia za kusoma, ubora wa vidokezo, na kuchagua hali sahihi ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Fourth, the tutor asks one next-best question. Not five questions. Not a lecture. One move that keeps the learner thinking.
entries.value: Nne, mkufunzi huuliza swali moja bora linalofuata. Si maswali matano. Si mhadhara. Hatua moja inayomfanya mwanafunzi aendelee kufikiri.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic
entries.value: Kijenga Maswali cha AI Bila Malipo kwa Mada Yoyote

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Kijenga Maswali cha AI Bila Malipo kwa Mada Yoyote ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: chagua mada yoyote na ukabiliane na jaribio lililolenga la maswali 10 ya chaguo nyingi. Unajibu swali moja kwa wakati, unapata mrejesho wa papo hapo, na unamaliza kwa alama na marudio.
